# 📡 ECHO FORGE RADAR: THE INSTITUTIONAL ADVANTAGE

Most traders react to price.

Smart money reacts to **intent**.

Echo Forge Radar doesn't show you what happened. It shows you what's **about to happen** before retail even notices.

🔍 Real-time institutional flow detection
⚡ Zero repainting. Zero lag. Zero noise.
🎯 Tier-1 accumulation signals before they hit the tape

While 95% of indicators are showing you yesterday's moves, Echo Forge is scanning tomorrow's alpha.

This isn't retail guesswork. This is the same quantitative architecture used by institutional desks—now available on the SML Platform.

Stop trading **against** the algorithm.
Start trading **with** it. 🕵️‍♂️

Available NOW on Script Master Labs.

The signal is live. Are you listening? 📡
